title: Adenoporces buxifolius
intro: I couldn't find any information about the plant Adenoporces buxifolius.
taxonomy: Adenoporces buxifolius is classified within the family Celastraceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the bittersweet or wax-leaved family. The Celastraceae family is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world, including Africa, Asia, Australia, and the Americas. Adenoporces buxifolius is a rare and endemic species, typically found in the mountainous regions of China. Within the Celastraceae family, Adenoporces buxifolius is further classified as a member of the genus Adenoporces.
